title: G2PLUS Pink Satin Ribbons, 20mm Valentine's Day Ribbons for Gift Wrapping, 22M Gift Wrap Ribbon, Decorative Gift Wrapping Ribbon for Valentine's Day, Crafting, Wedding Party Decoration
features: 【 Material】The gift ribbon roll is made of polyester fabric, strong and smooth, Lasts and doesn’t crease easily.
【Size】You'll get 1 rolls of 20mm wide ribbons, each is 22m in length, so total length of 44m.

【Looks Good on Wrapping up Presents】You can incorporate the simplicity brown paper with really beautiful ribbon. it will give a simple yet elegant look. it will add some nice sparkle when you use this gift ribbon for wrapping presents.

【Nice Ribbon for Handmade Project】These Satin ribbons are good to use in homemade card making or scrapbooking or for hanging up home ornaments. Ideal for wrapping up gifts or using for wedding decorations, wrapping around the bouquet or cake.

【Versatile Valentine's Day Ribbons】This set of ribbons is perfect for for many type of craft and decoration such as making different decorations for your Valentine's Day party. also good for present wrapping, gift packaging, party favor, hair bow, floral projects and so on.
description: Product Description 20mm Pink Stain Ribbon for Gift Wrapping Stain Ribbon Fabric for Gift Wrapping Wedding Decoration Gift ribbon rolls are made of polyester fabric, strong and smooth, durable and not easy to crease. Pink stained ribbon looks very pretty and gives a simple yet elegant look. Pink gift ribbons will add a little sparkle to your gifts when you wrap them with these gift ribbons. These dyed ribbons are perfect for homemade cards, scrapbooking or hanging home accessories. Ideal for making hair bows, wrapping gifts or for wedding decorations.
